title: IsoEnergy Ltd. R (I010.DU) stock price, news, quote and history
full_text: This page provides an overview of IsoEnergy Ltd. R (I010.DU) stock, including its current stock price, news, and historical data. As of April 2nd, the stock closed at 9.03 EUR, down 2.90%, and its year-to-date return was +24.38%. The article also features performance comparisons against the S&P/TSX Composite index.
